Go PRO

For only $9 a month or $99 a year (VAT included) PRO members get more out of CryptoPanic with extra features and benefits.

  • Configure instant alerts for currencies and news immediately in your email or mobile
  • Add any custom RSS/Atom feeds, Reddit and Twitter sources.
  • Disable/enable any existing default news sources.
  • A PRO badge that appears near username and on your profile showing your support for Coin Break.
  • More PRO features coming soon.

Coin Break is a blockchain news aggregator pulling the best stories from Reddit, Steemit, Medium, Twitter and 30+ bitcoin and ethereum websites.
